action.reasoning: Observation: Starting first iteration. Need to establish a baseline and measure iteration time. Analysis: A standard ResNet50 pre-trained on ImageNet, fine-tuned for 5 epochs, will serve as a good baseline. Resizing 32x32 CIFAR images to 224x224 allows us to leverage the pre-trained weights effectively. Decision: Write train.py and predict.py, train for 5 epochs, and submit for evaluation to get baseline metrics and timing.
